title: Event refactor: Profile-based attendance with multi-profile UI
description: Refactor event attendance from user_id to profile_id across all layers. Update domain EventRepository interface (SignUp, Withdraw, GetAttendees accept profile_id). Update mock EventRepository. Update migration (already covered by issue scout-app-9zn). Refactor event detail view: replace single sign-up button with a list of manageable profiles (user's own Profile + any linked youth Profiles). Each profile gets its own Sign Up / Withdraw button. Attendee list shows profile names (first+last) instead of emails. Update EventListItem attendee count to reflect profile count. Update EventHandler and all tests.

title: Registration flow: OTP verification and password creation
description: Build the /register → /register/verify → /register/complete flow. GET/POST /register: email input, look up Profile by email (reject if not found or already linked), generate 6-digit OTP, store in otp_codes, send via EmailService. GET/POST /register/verify: OTP input, validate code (not expired, not used), mark used. GET/POST /register/complete: password creation form, create User with bcrypt hash, link to Profile, set up session cookie, redirect to /events. All views are HTMX Go templates. Update login flow to find Profile by email → get linked User → verify password.

title: Migration: profiles, otp_codes, parent_youth_links, scoutbook_sessions tables + attendance refactor
description: Create new SQL migration that adds profiles, otp_codes, parent_youth_links, scoutbook_sessions tables. Migrate event_attendees from user_id to profile_id. Migrate event_attendee_responsibilities from user_id to profile_id. User table loses email column. Add unique index on profiles.bsa_id.

title: Domain model: Profile, OTPCode, ParentYouthLink, ScoutbookSession
description: Add Profile struct, OTPCode, ParentYouthLink, ScoutbookSession types to internal/domain/models.go. Add ProfileRepository, OTPRepository, ParentYouthLinkRepository, ScoutbookSessionRepository interfaces to internal/domain/repositories.go. Implement mock repositories. Add OTP generation/validation domain logic with expiry and used status. This is the foundation all other features depend on.

title: Claim youth flow: BSA ID linking with admin approval
description: Build (/claim-youth) page for registered parents. Form that takes a youth's BSA ID. Validates the BSA ID matches an existing Profile with member_type=youth and no existing linked User. Creates a ParentYouthLink record with status=pending. Admin approves or rejects on the /admin/links page. Once approved, the parent's event detail page shows the youth's name with individual sign-up/withdraw buttons.

title: Email service: SMTP integration for OTP delivery
description: Define EmailService interface in domain with SendOTP(recipient, code) method. Implement SMTP-based email sender using net/smtp with env vars SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS, SMTP_FROM. Wire into the app config in main.go. Add mock email sender for tests that captures sent emails in memory.

title: Admin page: Parent-youth link approval queue
description: Build admin-only page (/admin/links) that shows a queue of pending parent-youth link requests. Each row shows requesting parent name, youth name, youth BSA ID, and requested timestamp. Approve and Reject buttons. On approval: update link status to approved, establish the parent-youth relationship. On rejection: update to rejected. After approval, parent can act on behalf of that youth in event sign-ups.

title: Admin page: Scoutbook sync with token paste
description: Build admin-only page (/admin/sync) where admin can paste their LOGIN_DATA JSON from advancements.scouting.org localStorage. Decode and store the JWT in scoutbook_sessions table. Sync button triggers the SyncService with a spinner/progress indicator. Show sync results: profiles created, updated, marked inactive, and any errors.

title: Scoutbook sync engine: API client and sync logic
description: Build the Scoutbook API client in a new internal/scoutbook/ package. Implement a ScoutbookClient that takes a JWT token and orgGuid, and can fetch orgAdults and orgYouths roster endpoints (POST with {includeRegistrationDetails:true, includeExpired:true}). Implement dedup by memberId (BSA ID). Implement concurrent personprofile fetching for email/phone/birthdate. Implement the SyncService in domain that orchestrates: fetch → dedup → fetch profiles → upsert local Profiles → mark missing as inactive. Email sync rule: Scoutbook overwrites local if different; local preserved if Scoutbook has none.

title: Implement Event Detail View
description: Implement the detail page for a single event, showing details and a list of attendees. Add self-sign-up and withdrawal logic with HTMX.

title: Implement Authentication/RBAC
description: Implement basic login screen and middleware to enforce role-based access control. Support multiple roles per user. Permissions should be mapped to roles.

title: Implement Event List View
description: Implement the chronological sliding window (10 events) with HTMX lazy loading for both future and past events. Sort events ASC.

title: Define Database Schema
description: Design and implement tables for Users, Roles, Permissions, Events, and Attendees in CockroachDB. Ensure database interactions are abstracted behind interfaces as per ADR 0001.

title: Set up Go environment
description: Initialize Git repository if not already done. Configure version control (Dolt, beads) and issue tracking.
